name: nowsdk-pm
description: A ServiceNow Senior Architect for Claude Code: from a plain-language app description it generates whole-platform architecture & design documentation (AFU) — recommending best-fit components and annotating each with its delivery channel (Fluent SDK offline / Now SDK with auth / on-platform: App Engine Studio, UI Builder, Flow Designer) — then bootstraps a Now SDK workspace deliverable either live (standard Now SDK, with auth) or fully offline as a no-auth Update Set XML. Grounded in the official Now SDK and source-validated references.
